title: Aganisia ionoptera
taxonomy: Aganisia ionoptera is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Aganisia, which consists of tropical orchids found in South America. This species is native to Brazil and is known for its unique characteristics. Aganisia ionoptera is a small, epiphytic orchid with distinctive flowers and growth habits. It is often used in horticultural collections and by orchid enthusiasts due to its rarity and attractive appearance.
